description: Result of a complete constitutional workflow execution (src/shared/models/workflow_models.py). PhaseWorkflowResult is the new constitutional shape replacing the legacy WorkflowResult; both coexist in the same file without a deprecation path. total_actions and failed_actions are @property derived values, not declared fields. phase_results carries list[PhaseResult] — PhaseResult (sibling: name, ok, data, error, duration_sec) is part of the result-shape family (ok-nucleus). workflow_type is a bare str with no governed vocabulary (example values: 'refactor_modularity'). Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 Session 1.

ok.description: True if the workflow completed successfully.

workflow_type.description: Workflow type identifier (str, default ''). Example values: 'refactor_modularity'. No governed vocabulary yet.

phase_results.description: List of PhaseResult — per-phase execution outcomes. Default empty list.

total_duration.description: Total workflow execution duration in seconds. Default 0.0.
